issue_title: fix: prevent calendar from overlapping sidebar on mobile
issue_body_preview:
## Summary
- On mobile, the calendar grid (from `@event-calendar/core`) creates stacking contexts that paint above the sidebar overlay, causing calendar elements to bleed through
- Added explicit `z-30` to the overlay backdrop and `z-40` to the sidebar container so they reliably stack above page con
test_description_zh: 在移动端视口下，打开侧边栏（Sidebar），观察侧边栏遮罩层和侧边栏容器与日历网格之间的层叠关系。
expected_result_zh: 侧边栏打开后，其半透明遮罩层和侧边栏容器应完全覆盖在日历网格之上，日历元素不应透过或穿透侧边栏遮罩层显示出来。
